parsed.name: driver-compare-update
parsed.description: UPDATE by indexed column — pycubrid (Pure Python) vs CUBRIDdb (C extension). Same CUBRID 11.2 server, same CAS protocol, isolates driver implementation.

queries:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS bench_update
CREATE TABLE bench_update (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  amount INT NOT NULL
)
INSERT INTO bench_update
SELECT ROWNUM, 'user_' || CAST(ROWNUM AS VARCHAR), MOD(ROWNUM, 10000)
FROM db_class
LIMIT 1000

steps.name: update-by-pk
steps.query: UPDATE bench_update SET amount = %(amount)s WHERE id = %(id)s
